positive: Intricate celestial botanical composition featuring bioluminescent lunar flora intertwined with geometric cosmic nebulas. The style should be highly detailed, inspired by Art Nouveau and scientific illustration, using deep indigo, sapphire blue, forest green, and touches of metallic gold for maximal contrast. Focus on strong, defined silhouettes and clean linework suitable for screen printing or DTG application. The arrangement must be centrally composed and balanced, with a mandala-like structure guiding the eye. Perfect for a t-shirt print graphic, high contrast, symmetrical, clean edges, vector-like quality.
